metadata.title: Angels We Have Heard on High
metadata.subtitle: Les Anges dans nos campagnes — Gloria in excelsis Deo
metadata.composer: Traditional French carol, melody "Gloria" arranged by Edward Shippen Barnes (1887–1958, US PD)
metadata.lyricist: Anonymous French original (publ. 1805); English paraphrase by James Chadwick (1813–1882)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Anonymous French original (publ. 1805) and James Chadwick's English paraphrase (d. 1882) are PD by > 140 years. The traditional "Gloria" tune is also PD. Lyrics from English Wikipedia
metadata.x_translator: N/A (English original by Chadwick paraphrasing French)
